Bash(PYTHONIOENCODING=utf-8 "C:\\Users\\Edmond kwame Kumah\\AppData\\Local\\Programs\\pgAdmin 4\\python\\python.exe" -c "
import os
d = 'C:/Users/Edmond kwame Kumah/Documents/X-space-downloader/.segments_1jMKgmBNDAeJL'
files = os.listdir\(d\)
sizes = [os.path.getsize\(os.path.join\(d, f\)\) for f in files]
print\(f'Files: {len\(files\)}'\)
print\(f'Total size: {sum\(sizes\):,} bytes = {sum\(sizes\)/1024/1024:.1f} MB'\)
print\(f'Min: {min\(sizes\)}  Max: {max\(sizes\)}  Avg: {sum\(sizes\)//len\(sizes\)}'\)
zeros = sum\(1 for s in sizes if s == 0\)
print\(f'Zero-byte files: {zeros}'\)
for f in sorted\(files\)[:3]:
    print\(f'  {f}: {os.path.getsize\(os.path.join\(d,f\)\)} bytes'\)
print\('  ...'\)
for f in sorted\(files\)[-3:]:
    print\(f'  {f}: {os.path.getsize\(os.path.join\(d,f\)\)} bytes'\)
" 2>&1)
